articles.title: Polygon Teams Up With BitGo After A Controversial Hardfork Upgrade
articles.description: Polygon has partnered with BitGo to provide MATIC holders with staking capabilities. Moreover, the users can earn rewards by staking ERC-20 MATIC tokens. BitGo decided to support Polygon because of its benefits like fast speed, low gas fees, higher security, and commitment to carbon neutrality. Another Strategic Partnership For Polygon The Polygon-BitGo partnership is not […]

articles.title: CryptoSlate Wrapped Daily: Genesis files for bankruptcy; Cardano creator wants CoinDesk
articles.description: The biggest news in the cryptoverse for January 20 saw Genesis Global Capital file for bankruptcy.

articles.title: XRP Transactions Skyrocket In Australian Top Exchanges
articles.description: Ripple has reached a new milestone in Australia with its native token, XRP, recording the highest trading volumes on exchanges. With this, Ripple now dominates Australian crypto exchanges as the XRP community anticipates a final court ruling in the lawsuit with the U.S. SEC (Securities And Exchange Commission). The news came from Financial Review, an Australian media outlet shared on Twitter...

articles.title: Dogecoin Rival Shiba Inu (SHIB) Continues Price Surge This Week Amid New Listing on Top South Korean Exchange
articles.description: Dogecoin (DOGE) rival Shiba Inu (SHIB) is continuing its 2023 price surge this week as it gets a listing on South Korea’s top crypto exchange by trading volume. The Seoul-based Upbit, which registered more trading volume than any other exchange besides Binance in the 24 hours prior to writing, listed SHIB against the South Korean […]

articles.title: Former head of FTX.US raises $5M from Coinbase, Circle for a new crypto startup
articles.description: Former FTX US President Brett Harrison is in the process of launching a new cryptocurrency startup that would service institutional clients.
